where a resource is intended to be used.   \r\n   \r\n   Note: The codes for countries and country subdivisions are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)    while the codes for \"supra-national\" regions are from    [UN Standard country or area codes for statistical use
